property.name: type
property.label: Type
property.description: The type of message (Options: alert, success, warning, error, info, custom)

property.name: icon
property.label: Icon
property.description: Choose your Icon if you want to override the default icon of the type. See https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/#utility for all available icons

property.name: titleFontSize
property.label: Title Font Size
property.description: Font size for the title in pixels (default: 16)

property.name: bodyFontSize
property.label: Body Font Size
property.description: Font size for the body in pixels (default: 16)
